name: LASIX 4ML
description: A diuretic medicine that helps the body get rid of excess water or fluid, used for heart failure, pulmonary edema, and kidney/liver diseases.
storageInstructions: Store at a temperature below 25°C in a cool and dry place.

name: LEVIPIL 500 1*15TAB
description: Medication used to control seizures in people with epilepsy by reducing abnormal brain activity.
dosage: Take as prescribed by your doctor at the same time each day, with or without food.
storageInstructions: Store at 25°C and keep out of children's reach.

name: LEVOFLOX 500MG 1*10TAB
description: An antibiotic medicine containing levofloxacin used to treat bacterial infections of the lungs, throat, airways, nose, ears, urinary tract, skin, and soft tissues.
dosage: Take as directed by doctor; swallow whole with water; may be taken with or without food.
storageInstructions: Store at room temperature, protected from moisture, sunlight, and heat.

name: LEVOLIN INHALER
description: Used to treat respiratory conditions such as chronic obstructive pulmonary disease (COPD) and asthma.
dosage: Exact number of puffs as prescribed by doctor; maximum 12 inhalations in 24 hours.
storageInstructions: Store below 25°C in a cool, dry place in its original packaging.

name: LILIFIN CREAM 10GM
description: Topical antifungal cream designed to treat fungal skin infections such as athlete's foot, ringworm, and jock itch.
uses: Tinea infections (athlete's foot, ringworm, jock itch)
dosage: Apply thin film to affected area and 1 inch surrounding skin. External use only.
storageInstructions: Store at room temperature between 20-25°C. Use within one month after opening.

name: LIMCEE
description: Chewable Vitamin C supplement designed to support immunity, provide antioxidant protection, and promote skin health.
uses: Prevention and treatment of Vitamin C deficiency
dosage: Take as prescribed by doctor; chew thoroughly before swallowing.

name: LIV-52 TAB
description: Clinically proven to help care for the liver, with hepatoprotective and antioxidant properties.
dosage: 2-3 tablets before meals, 3-4 times daily, or as directed by physician.

name: LIV-52 100ML SYP
description: Ayurvedic liver care syrup formulated by Himalaya to support hepatic function and overall liver health.

name: LIV-52 200ML SYP
description: Ayurvedic liver care syrup formulated by Himalaya to support hepatic function and overall liver health.
